title: Grass Rocks+
description: Adds neat little rocks and pebbles onto grass and similar blocks
body:
Grass Rocks+ is a texture pack that adds little rocks and pebbles to grass and related blocks!
This even works in the Nether, adding little netherrack stones on warped and crimson nylium!\
Features:
- Well-optimized — This pack hides invisible faces and uses culling to ensure the rocks have little to no performance impact!
- Compatible with other packs — This pack dynamically adjusts the texture of the rocks to fit with the resource pack you are using!
- Clean and random — Grass Rocks+ has different variants of rocks with different rotations, and has been engineered to make sure they don't clutter up you world.
- Vanilla-friendly — This pack works completely in Vanilla Minecraft with no compromises whatsoever!
![Grass Rocks in a Plains Biome](https://i.postimg.cc/rFYTQSFj/2024-11-24-13-52-47.png)\
I hope you enjoy!
